title: AlphaFold three-body folding
summary: AlphaFold predicts protein structure by coordinating evolutionary co-variation, physical constraints, and an attention architecture that learns how amino acids interact in 3D — a DAG from three independent information sources to a single structural prediction.
source: Ch03 — Demis Hassabis: "Evolutionary Information · Physical Constraints · Attention Architecture"

nodes.label: Attention Architecture
nodes.description: Pair and triangle attention over residues

edges.description: Sequence tokens feed the attention stack

identifiability_note: Treated as a feed-forward DAG: each input channel is independently controllable through ablation, and the attention mediator's contribution is identifiable by holding sequence and evolutionary inputs fixed.
